texto: Sometimes the pain is a startling breach that hobbles your entire soul
autor: dreadful losses that rupture your perceived reality. Pain so visceral and unrelenting that even death itself can begin to look like a welcomed and kind benefactor.
explicacao: Citação de dreadful losses that rupture your perceived reality.
